name: Goal Tracker
description: Set goals, break them into milestones, and track progress over time.
author: ultralight

add_goal.description: Create a new goal with optional milestones. Each milestone is a step toward completing the goal.

add_milestone.description: Add a milestone to an existing goal.

update.description: Update progress on a goal or mark a milestone complete. Provide goal_id to update the goal, or both goal_id and milestone_id to update a specific milestone.

goal_id.description: ID of the goal to update

milestone_id.description: ID of a specific milestone to update

list.description: List goals with their milestones and progress.

status.description: Filter by status: active, completed, paused, or all (default: all)

returns.description: List of goals with milestones and progress

review.description: Get a summary of all active goals: progress, overdue items, and upcoming milestones.

returns.description: Review with summaries, overdue items, and upcoming milestones

status.description: Quick count of total, active, and completed goals.
